title: OREGON MEDICAL BOARD - 211info
text: OREGON MEDICAL BOARD OREGON MEDICAL BOARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about medical doctors, doctors of osteopathic medicine, physician assistants, acupuncturists, and podiatric physicians. Information provided at no charge includes date first licensed in Oregon and verification of current licensure and status. Public may search board database online to obtain a licensee educational history, and any disciplinary actions or malpractice claims finalized against a licensee. Board handles complaints about licensees, license applications and renewals. If Board cannot address the needs for the complaint, the Complaint Resource Officer may be able to provide referrals to the appropriate agency or organization. 1500 SW 1st Avenue Suite 620 Portland, OR 972015847 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (971) 673-2700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-2700 Complaint Resource Officer (971) 673-2702 Toll-free (877) 254-6263 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: No charge for public information obtained from the board web site. Basic information available by phone at no charge. Other information subject to the fees established by OAR 847. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Occupational/Professional Licensing and Certification Practitioner Complaints If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON MEDICAL BOARD
